# Vendored: pandoc-ext/diagram

Source: https://github.com/pandoc-ext/diagram  
File: `_extensions/diagram/diagram.lua`  
License: MIT (see `LICENSE`)  
Purpose: Pandoc Lua filter for Mermaid / PlantUML / Graphviz / etc. used by
`render_markdown_acceptance_html.py` when converting Plan acceptance packs.

Do not edit `diagram.lua` locally except to sync from upstream.
